Building India's Networking Infrastructure

BHL Networks is India's trusted partner for high-quality SFP modules, fiber products, ethernet switches, and structured cabling. We empower 1000+ dealers with dealer-friendly pricing, same-day dispatch, and expert technical support.

0+
Products

Dealers

States
0%
Satisfaction

Our Mission

To make high-quality networking products accessible and affordable for every ISP, enterprise, and system integrator in India. We believe that reliable connectivity should not come at a premium.

Our Vision

To become India's most trusted networking partner by 2030, with a dealer network spanning every state and a product catalog that covers every networking need from fiber to the home to enterprise data centers.

Our Values

The principles that guide every decision we make

Quality First

Every product is tested and certified before it reaches our dealers.

Transparency

Clear pricing, honest specs, and no hidden costs.

Dealer Success

Your growth is our growth. We provide marketing and technical support.

Partnership

Long-term relationships with 1000+ dealers across India.

Certification

All products are CE, RoHS, and MSA compliant.

Innovation

Constantly expanding our catalog with the latest networking tech.

Our Journey

From a small startup to India's trusted networking partner

2018

Founded

BHL Networks started with a vision to provide affordable networking products.

2020

100+ Dealers

Crossed 100 active dealer partners across North India.

2022

400+ Products

Expanded catalog to 400+ SKUs covering all networking categories.

2024

Pan-India

Serving 1000+ dealers across 20+ states with same-day dispatch.

2026

Industry Leader

India's trusted networking partner for ISPs, enterprises, and integrators.

Ready to Partner With Us?

Join 1000+ dealers who trust BHL Networks for quality products and reliable support.
